about.title: About FemRes
about.subtitle: Global feminist voices, promoting gender equality

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description1: FemRes aims to be the highest quality feminist content aggregation platform globally. We believe the power of knowledge and information can drive social change, providing rich learning resources for everyone interested in gender equality by aggregating feminist thought, research, and practice from around the world.
mission.description2: In an era of fragmented information, we ensure through intelligent filtering and classification that every piece of recommended content has undergone strict quality control, helping users efficiently access valuable information and deeply understand diverse feminist perspectives.

genderEquality.title: Gender Equality
genderEquality.description: Advocating for equal rights, opportunities, and dignity for all genders across all fields of society

intersectionality.title: Intersectionality
intersectionality.description: Recognizing how gender intersects with race, class, orientation, and disability, seeking holistic justice

knowledgeEmpowerment.title: Knowledge Empowerment
knowledgeEmpowerment.description: Believing education is key to equality, committed to making feminism accessible to all

openInclusion.title: Open Inclusion
openInclusion.description: Welcoming diverse backgrounds and perspectives to foster understanding through dialogue

workplaceEquality.description: Eliminating discrimination, pushing for equal pay, and breaking glass ceilings

bodilyAutonomy.description: Focusing on rights over one's body, including reproductive and health rights

educationRights.title: Education Rights

politicalParticipation.description: Improving female representation and participation in decision-making

items.question: How do I submit content to FemRes?
items.answer: You can submit by emailing submissions@femres.org with the title, author, summary, and link. Our editorial team will review it and reply within 7 business days.

items.question: How does FemRes filter content?
items.answer: We combine AI technology with human review. Algorithms perform initial screening, followed by expert review to ensure accuracy, relevance, and value, with a focus on diversity.

items.question: How can I become a volunteer?
items.answer: We welcome volunteers in all fields! Email volunteer@femres.org with your background and area of interest. We need editors, developers, designers, and translators.

items.question: Does FemRes accept donations?
items.answer: As a non-profit, we rely on community support. If you'd like to help, contact partnership@femres.org. All funds go toward platform maintenance and content development.

items.question: How do I report content issues or errors?
items.answer: Found an error or broken link? Contact info@femres.org with the page link and description. We'll handle it as soon as possible.

info.title: Contact Info
info.note: FemRes is a volunteer-run open-source project; we aim to respond within 48 hours.

guidelines.title: Submission Guidelines
guidelines.subtitle: Follow these rules to ensure content quality.

rules.title: Relevance
rules.description: Must be directly related to feminism or gender studies.

rules.title: Quality
rules.description: Ensure educational value, accuracy, and reliability.

rules.title: Copyright
rules.description: Respect IP and ensure content doesn't infringe rights.

rules.title: Inclusion
rules.description: Diverse views are welcome; no hate speech or discrimination.
